description: Simple and elegant, these gladiator sandals from catwalk epitomise minimalist class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments, this pair is the right choice. Wear this with off-duty ensembles. Upper Metallic coloured straps covering the forefoot and the midfoot Soft footbed, ergonomically curved for absolute comfort and style Forefoot and midfoot straps connected to a buckled strap that loops around the ankle Outsole TPU outsole with branded grooves and a circular lug on the heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
